partyFolderName.name: Party Folder Name
partyFolderName.hint: Actor folder name that represents the party (sheet icon appears on this folder).

allowPlayerStashCurrency.name: Players Can Edit Stash Currency
allowPlayerStashCurrency.hint: When enabled, active players can add and subtract currency on the Stash tab. When disabled, only the GM can change stash currency.

stashChatLog.name: Post Stash Actions to Chat
stashChatLog.hint: When enabled, currency and item changes on the Party Stash tab are posted as public chat messages.

sheet.title: Party Sheet

stash.deleteBlocked: The Party Stash actor cannot be deleted. Manage items through the Party Sheet Stash tab.

transferQuantity.title: Transfer Items
transferQuantity.hint: {name} — how many do you want to transfer? (maximum {max})
transferQuantity.label: Quantity
transferQuantity.invalid: Enter a whole number from 1 to {max}.

currency.subtractByGp: Subtract by total GP value (sum of fields below; uses cheapest coins first)
currency.insufficientFunds: The stash does not have enough funds for this subtraction.

stash.notInitialized: The party stash is not ready yet. Ask your GM to open the Party Sheet once so it can be set up.

chatLog.currencyRemovedByGp: {player} ({character}) removed currency worth {gp} gp from Party Stash
chatLog.currencyRemovedByGpNoCharacter: {player} removed currency worth {gp} gp from Party Stash
chatLog.itemDepositedFromInventory: {player} ({character}) deposited {item} from inventory into Party Stash
chatLog.itemAddedFromCompendium: {player} ({character}) added {item} to Party Stash from compendium {source}
chatLog.itemAddedFromCompendiumNoCharacter: {player} added {item} to Party Stash from compendium {source}
chatLog.itemAddedFromItemsDirectory: {player} ({character}) added {item} to Party Stash from the Items Directory
chatLog.itemAddedFromItemsDirectoryNoCharacter: {player} added {item} to Party Stash from the Items Directory

sheet.noPartyFolder: No actor folder named "{name}" was found. Create an Actor folder with that exact name (default: Party) or change the module setting.
